query: SELECT id, criadoPorId, criadoPorNome, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(createdAt, '+00:00', '-03:00'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i') as createdAtBrasilia FROM credit_tasks ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5
